commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; the branch needs contributor-supplied live proof plus maintainer handling for the protected voice-call behavior change.; Cleared: The diff only changes voice-call realtime greeting routing and colocated tests; it does not modify dependencies, workflows, secrets, auth, publishing, or other supply-chain surfaces. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes voice-call realtime startup so OpenAI outbound initial messages are folded into session instructions and no longer trigger an explicit on-ready greeting, while non-OpenAI providers still trigger explicit greetings and tests cover both paths.

PR surface: Source +28, Tests +131. Total +159 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source and linked live report: current main queues triggerGreetingOnReady for initial messages while the OpenAI realtime provider defaults server VAD create_response to true. I did not run a live Twilio/OpenAI call in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the branch needs contributor-supplied live proof plus maintainer handling for the protected voice-call behavior change.
